evidence.method: Rendered grayscale HTML inspection plus browser geometry at 1440x900 and 390x844
limitations: Not eye tracking or participant evidence
Media remains a literal placeholder at this stage
Mobile and desktop predictions require blind Human-QA comparison

intent.user_goal: Понять категорию, реальную публичную пользу и безопасный первый шаг до регистрации.
intent.business_goal: Довести подходящего холодного посетителя до текущего каталога; вклад автора оставить вторичным до продуктового доказательства.
intent.decision_moment: Decide whether to inspect the current public catalog before any authentication boundary.
intended_route: Сделали с AI? Дайте проекту публичную жизнь.
intent.desired_action: Нажать “Смотреть проекты” и перейти в текущий каталог.

predicted_route.label: Социальная платформа для вайбкодеров
predicted_route.semantic_job: Name the product category and audience
predicted_route.attention_receipt: This is a social/public product for people who build with AI.

predicted_route.label: Сделали с AI? Дайте проекту публичную жизнь.
predicted_route.semantic_job: Turn the private-result problem into the promised public state
predicted_route.attention_receipt: A finished AI project can receive a public life/address.

predicted_route.label: Смотреть проекты
predicted_route.semantic_job: Offer a low-risk product inspection route
predicted_route.attention_receipt: I can inspect current public projects now.

predicted_route.label: Реальная публичная запись / demo
predicted_route.semantic_job: Make the product and evidence level visible before commitment
predicted_route.attention_receipt: The mechanism is a real demo project record, not a generic community metaphor.

predicted_route.label: Каталог открывается без регистрации
predicted_route.semantic_job: Reduce authentication risk and disclose changing inventory
predicted_route.attention_receipt: Browsing is public; current inventory changes.

axes_grid.note: Two aligned masses share the same upper and lower bands; no detached center void.

alignment.note: Category, H1, lead, actions and condition use one left anchor; proof elements share one contained right anchor.

spacing.note: Meaning, explanation, action and condition remain separate without pushing the CTA below 900px after repair.

grouping.note: The proof boundary is inside the proof object; the browse condition stays adjacent to the public action.

typography.note: H1 remains three desktop lines and five compact mobile lines; condition text stays at readable sketch size.

affordance.note: One filled primary action and one text contribution action are visually distinct and use literal labels.

fold.note: At 1440x900 the primary CTA and condition are visible; at 390x844 the proof container begins at the fold after CTA and condition.

density_rhythm.note: The first viewport carries category, outcome, action, proof and condition without a decorative empty field.

whitespace.note: Whitespace separates message and proof; every large quiet area has a grouping or transition job.

responsive.note: 390px route reorders copy, action, condition and proof vertically with zero horizontal overflow; it is not a compressed two-column layout.

findings.evidence: Initial 1440x900 render clipped the primary CTA; H1 geometry and vertical spacing were repaired and browser geometry now places the button at y=750..804.
findings.user_impact: The main public action is fully visible during the first decision moment.
findings.fix: Keep the accepted three-line desktop headline and current action band through the golden slice.
findings.acceptance: Golden-slice 1440x900 capture keeps category, H1, primary action, condition and meaningful product proof in the first viewport.

findings.evidence: Headline and proof are both high-mass objects, but they answer promise and reason-to-believe rather than separate tasks.
findings.user_impact: Attention may alternate between the two, which is acceptable only if both lead to the public catalog interpretation.
findings.fix: Do not add a third high-amplitude object or cinematic metaphor in the Hero.
findings.acceptance: Blind trace recalls the product category, public-project benefit and catalog action without treating the proof as an unrelated dashboard.
